textByHash.b108db81e2ef7cb6b03064d1804f8f3b93f4ecf7: He did. He's keen to see this Hughes business sorted quickly.
textByHash.b15118d64f67a718501d80d4edcc1e4a609543f1: Forgive me Commander, but it doesn't seem like you do. Hughes escaped from right under your nose, and now Councillor Andrews is putting his faith in Lawry over you.
textByHash.ee2acaf0a8840ecd1f49263d0795f8ea368fa524: While this may be Council business, Lord Shayzien is responsible for dealing with both internal and external threats. He wants to be sure that Hughes won't be an issue.
textByHash.912c9f88f93488672486732a8ac712e29607966a: I hope you're right. There's already a lot of doubt in the Council these days. It would be rather embarrassing for them if the Shayzien Army had to step in.
textByHash.2e294f998ec80f961e80177789983474c1388754: I'm busy here. Do you need something?
textByHash.6c5422834f41473819479696a96db18e9c272c54: Gangs. It's the gangs from the slums in the east. Those ruffians are always hatching schemes, whether it's smuggling or extortion or even plain street violence.
textByHash.0ceb6979832ae35436979d80aa3689851b9b7cca: I'm in charge of the investigations unit. Sometimes an informant will let us know when a gang is meeting. Then we can send in the troops and get them.
textByHash.399a113f6f6fd6ffb42d6d6ae1b9a7859dce8771: That would be very welcome. Information about gang meetings is written on the notice board when it's received. When you see a meeting announced there, go and deal with 'em.
textByHash.b16b0c8eaf67f4b5e202e477d6cb6bc2f059218a: If they drop any documents, bring them to me for an extra reward.
textByHash.a255d1d09ca8727cb027818aa26125a2d60f6e76: Hello again. Thanks for offering to help deal with the criminal gangs.
textByHash.4fa014edb65e17b08b3964c2a290b7c5c290598d: No, not at the moment. Keep checking the notice board - information is written there when we receive it.
textByHash.b9cbfcb6f9da8bcc2f98f0e96bdce090f99a5ad3: We've received reports of a gang ! They're meeting .
textByHash.18c95d992e58ce6069a56a6a290bcb1cbbbd43f7: We believe the meeting is in progress now.
textByHash.dabfa95f4b30958f60d1ba8018995c6b0bf55c07: We believe the meeting is about to start imminently.
textByHash.3ba5224f450082eb3089c01f5e4e446ca16ef842: We believe the meeting will start in about minutes.
textByHash.4997b11217c23677bbb18c5b500af94ce13d45d8: Gang meeting information is written on the notice board when it's received from the informants. When you see a meeting announced there, go and deal with 'em.
textByHash.2c1705ae61084c96fb8897354b70c0f410e1f0c5: Come over here and talk to me before you mess around with that.
textByHash.e72f34acfbf796b9746bc254e3de744bb792ccb2: No thanks, I don't need that.
textByHash.df3f16c512e04beb23277950886a5c9453195dc2: Thank you. This will help us track down more gang meetings in future.
textByHash.88297814b4a4ad9ceceaac1f388269bc2bab6e6e: I don't remember asking you to help, but... okay, thank you, whoever you are.
textByHash.313682b9e2b27d957cd0d96c23f934c91da75c1d: Please leave. There is confidential information in here, and you are not authorised to view it.
